conversation.content:
Extract values for these columns. Document has 0 pages.

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a high volume or burden of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 2: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the clinical trial with high volume/burden metastasis? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 3: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the control arm of the trial with low volume/burden metastases? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 4: Gleason score - N (%) | ≤ 7 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants included in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 7 or less? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 5: Gleason score - N (%) | ≤ 7 | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients with a Gleason score of 7 or less in the control arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 6: Gleason score - N (%) | ≥ 8 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 8 or higher? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 7: Gleason score - N (%) | ≥ 8 | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients in the control arm of the clinical trial with a Gleason score of 8 or higher? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 8: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants with synchronous metastases (metastases at the time of diagnosis of prostate cancer) in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 9: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants with synchronous metastases (metastases at the time of diagnosis of prostate cancer) in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 10: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants with metachronous metastases (metastases that occur after the diagnosis of prostate cancer) in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 11: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients with metachronous metastases (metastases that occur after the diagnosis of prostate cancer) in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 12: PS - N (%) | 0 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants included in the treatment arm with a Performance Status (PS) score of 0? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 13: PS - N (%) | 0 | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients with a Performance Status (PS) score of 0 in the control arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 14: PS - N (%) | 1-2 | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of participants with a Performance Status (PS) score of 1-2 in the treatment arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
---
Column 15: PS - N (%) | 1-2 | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients with performance status (PS) score of 1-2 in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.

For informational columns (trial name, arms, etc.), use get_chunks_by_page([1, 2]) first. For specific columns, use search_chunks. Submit when you have enough information.
